positive: Minimalist, high-contrast vector graphic illustration of a stylized owl perched on a crescent moon, surrounded by geometric celestial elements and abstract star trails. The owl should have clean, sharp edges and a strong silhouette. Use a limited palette of deep indigo, vibrant gold, and matte black. The composition must be centrally balanced, optimized for a repeating apparel pattern or a single, impactful print placement. Style should be modern, stylized folk art meets celestial geometry. Seamless, graphic design quality, perfect for DTG printing.
